query:
INSERT INTO quiz_questions (lessonId, question, questionType, options, correctAnswer, questionOrder) VALUES
(750003, 'What does "eschatology" specifically study?', 'multiple_choice', '["The doctrine of creation","The doctrine of last things","The doctrine of the church","The doctrine of humanity"]', 'The doctrine of last things', 1),
(750003, 'The Greek term eschatos means:', 'multiple_choice', '["First","Last","Middle","Beginning"]', 'Last', 2),
(750003, 'The Hebrew term yôm YHWH refers to:', 'multiple_choice', '["The Sabbath day","The Day of the Lord","The day of creation","The day of rest"]', 'The Day of the Lord', 3),
(750003, 'The Greek term parousia denotes:', 'multiple_choice', '["Christ''s birth","Christ''s coming/presence","Christ''s death","Christ''s ascension"]', 'Christ''s coming/presence', 4),
(750003, 'According to 1 Thessalonians 4:13-18, believers will:', 'multiple_choice', '["Remain in the grave","Be resurrected and caught up to meet the Lord","Cease to exist","Be reincarnated"]', 'Be resurrected and caught up to meet the Lord', 5),
(750003, 'Premillennialism teaches that Christ returns:', 'multiple_choice', '["After the millennium","Before a literal thousand-year reign","At the end of history","Never"]', 'Before a literal thousand-year reign', 6),
(750003, 'Amillennialism interprets the millennium as:', 'multiple_choice', '["A literal future period","Symbolizing the present church age","Already past","Non-existent"]', 'Symbolizing the present church age', 7),
(750003, 'The intermediate state refers to:', 'multiple_choice', '["Life before birth","Conscious existence between death and resurrection","Purgatory only","Unconscious sleep"]', 'Conscious existence between death and resurrection', 8),
(750003, 'Revelation 21-22 describes:', 'multiple_choice', '["The fall of humanity","The new heavens and new earth","The creation of angels","The flood narrative"]', 'The new heavens and new earth', 9),
(750003, 'Why is eschatology essential for Christian living?', 'multiple_choice', '["It is merely speculative","It provides hope and motivation for holy living","It focuses only on fear","It has no practical application"]', 'It provides hope and motivation for holy living', 10),
(750003, 'Explain how the "already/not yet" tension in eschatology shapes Christian ethics and mission.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'The kingdom is already inaugurated in Christ but not yet consummated, motivating believers to live faithfully while awaiting Christ''s return', 11);
command:

(750003, 'The Greek term eschatos means:', 'multiple_choice', '["First","Last","Middle","Beginning"]', 'Last', 2),

(750003, 'Premillennialism teaches that Christ returns:', 'multiple_choice', '["After the millennium","Before a literal thousand-year reign","At the end of history","Never"]', 'Before a literal thousand-year reign', 6),
(750003, 'Amillennialism interprets the millennium as:', 'multiple_choice', '["A literal future period","Symbolizing the present church age","Already past","Non-existent"]', 'Symbolizing the present church age', 7),
(750003, 'The intermediate state refers to:', 'multiple_choice', '["Life before birth","Conscious existence between death and resurrection","Purgatory only","Unconscious sleep"]', 'Conscious existence between death and resurrection', 8),
(750003, 'Revelation 21-22 describes:', 'multiple_choice', '["The fall of humanity","The new heavens and new earth","The creation of angels","The flood narrative"]', 'The new heavens and new earth', 9),
(750003, 'Why is eschatology essential for Christian living?', 'multiple_choice', '["It is merely speculative","It provides hope and motivation for holy living","It focuses only on fear","It has no practical application"]', 'It provides hope and motivation for holy living', 10),
(750003, 'Explain how the "already/not yet" tension in eschatology shapes Christian ethics and mission.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'The kingdom is already inaugurated in Christ but not yet consummated, motivating believers to live faithfully while awaiting Christ''s return', 11);
